rationale: This is exceptional magazine-style profile writing. The opening image of hands on the wheel is precise and evocative, doing triple duty as physical description, character revelation, and thematic statement. The specificity is outstanding — the napkin calculation, the Steinway in 1998, the ratchet straps and moving blankets, the bay 'the color of an old dime.' The language is plain and muscular without a single inflated word. The structure flows naturally from close physical observation outward to biography and back to scene. The voice is warm, confident, and distinctly human. The only issue is that it's clearly incomplete (cuts off mid-sentence), but what exists on the page is near-flawless craft. Every sentence earns its place.
